Content: Rasa macam kau single??. Sebab lepas grad masing2 dah tanggungjawab and komitment. Dah tak boleh nak tumpu dekat kau je lagi. Sakit bila kau perlu dia, bila kau nak dekat dekat dia tapi tak dapat. Hati je kena kuat. Yang penting jujur. Kalau ada apa2 tak puas hati kita settle cara baik

Content: LDR itu bukan 'true love', itu cuma simulasi jadi badut jarak jauh. Lo setia jaga komitmen, sementara dia di sana lagi 'jaga' perasaan orang lain yang lebih deket secara fisik. Cinta ga kenal jarak? Bullshit. Lo cuma investasi di hantu digital
translated_experience: LDR is not 'true love', it's just a simulation of being a long-distance clown. You faithfully maintain your commitments, while he is there 'looking after' the feelings of other people who are closer physically. Love knows no distance? Bullshit. You just invest in digital ghosts

Content:
Long distance relationships show you what love actually needs trust, honest communication, and steady effort. When you can't reach for each other, every message and call becomes a choice to stay connected
It's hard sometimes, but choosing each other across miles proves the bond is built on commitment, not convenience.

Content:
how to make long distance relationship actually work: 

- talk everyday. text each other about your days.
- if you're busy, just sit on video call and do your own work. silent company still counts
- send small suprise gifts. it's the effort.
- plan visits so you have something to look forward to.
- and most important - find someone who's willing to put in the effort and stay loyal. it can't be one-sided

Content:
It's true that long-distance relationships can be challenging due to the physical separation. Trust and communication become even more cruscial in these situations. While the lack of physical presence can make it harder to 
feel connected, many couples successfully navigate these challenges through regular communication, setting clear expectations, and finding creative ways to stay connected emotionally. It's also important to establish trust, as worrying about infidelity can undermine the relationship. Ultimately, successs often depends on the commitment and effort both partners are willing to invest. ???

Content:
Let's talk about "long distance relationship".

If you can avoid it, please do by all means. You need to stay close to whomever you're in a relationship with. The person should not be miles away from you. 
Long distance relationship has worked for some people, but if you can avoid it, do so for your own sanity. If you stay away from your partner for a year, it's always difficult to connect again again regardless of how many times a day you call each other. Physical connection or emotional intimacy is very important in a relationship. LDR is a boring relationship & it leads to miscommunication & lack of trust. You and your partner can fight over the most insignificant things because of doubts. And this also affects marriages. Where husband & wife are far apart for too long. But for marriage, it has to be done if unavoidable. Because it's definitely for the good of the family.

Content:
In as much as I agree with all you say, distance shouldn't be an excuse for infidelity.
There is a role Accountability plays in our lives. LDR I not as difficult as most people paint it. It's just that we want to eat our cakes and have it.
LDR doubles the Rules, that a close-contact relationship offer.
Which means the commitment level must double, some friends will be lost, some activities won't be attended.
All in all, your mindset must be strong. And the happiness is towards the end goal; being together once again.
Life is not just B & W

Content: Bagi aku, bila LDR ni sakit act, sebab tak tahu apa dia buat kat sana, so kita kena percaya antara satu sama lain, sentiasa communicate & masing2 ada perasaan jaga hati. Bila gaduh or ada masalah bincang leklok, bincang dengan hati yang ikhlas & jujur tros terang, tolak ansur.

Content: Gw sih sistem percaya, udh komunikasi aktif hampir 24/7 tp kalo semisal doi tetap selingkuh ya udh berarti bukan jodohnya. Pacaran LDR udh 6th+lebih mau dramatis ttg permasalahan hubungan itu udh gk ada energi nya lagi gk tertarik udh cape gr2 kerjaan, jd ya udh take or leave.
translated_experience: I believe in the system, I have active communication almost 24/7, but if for example he continues to cheat, that means he is not his soul mate. I've been in an LDR relationship for 6 years+, I want to be dramatic about relationship problems, I don't have the energy anymore, I'm not interested, I'm tired of all my work, so I've taken it or left.

Content: Yupp beneeer kaak! Aku alhamdulillah udh jalan 6tahun LDR so far aman2 saja. Kita selalu berkabar, ngga chattan tiap menit karna tau kesibukan masing2. Tau mana prioritas aja sih & jangan aneh2 kunci nya, selama 2 hal ini dijalanin insyaAllah kedepannya aman!
translated_experience: Yupp that's right sis! Thank God I've been in a long distance relationship for 6 years so far I'm safe. Content:
I think in an ldr it's even more important to keep daily communication since you're not seeing each other all the time. Even a "Hey I'm busy today but we'll chat later tonight" goes a long way
